data.current_description: Submit a request to confirm whether funds are available in a given account for a specified amount.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit funds confirmation request for account
data.description_suggestion: Submits a Funds Confirmation Service (FCS) request under PSD2 regulation to verify whether sufficient funds are available in a specified account for a given amount. Requires OAuth2 authentication and a valid FundsConfirmationRequest containing account details and amount to confirm. Returns a FundsConfirmationResponse indicating fund availability status. This operation does not reserve or block funds, only confirms their availability at the time of the request.
data.reasoning: Original summary is passive and noun-focused rather than action-oriented. Description lacks critical details about: (1) the PSD2/PIIS regulatory context, (2) authentication requirements, (3) what the request object should contain, (4) what the response contains, and (5) important side effect clarification that funds are not reserved. Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of when to use this operation, what inputs are needed, what to expect in response, and important behavioral characteristics for proper decision-making.
